untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'shallow market decline amplitude' (less than [THRESHOLD_NEEDED]% of prior move) and 'competing large buyers entering market' — these require multi-bar pattern recognition and institutional flow detection not available in the allowed indicator set. Also requires comparison of current decline amplitude to prior move amplitude, which needs historical lookback beyond prev_* fields.
translation_notes: Translated observable components: price closes above decline low (close > prev_low) on recovery, volume on recovery exceeds decline volume (volume > prev_volume), and market in recent decline (returns < 0). Unable to quantify 'shallow decline' threshold or detect institutional buying pressure without additional indicators like order flow or market microstructure data.
